import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """
    Reward for picking up the blue pyramid.
    
    Milestones:
    1. Dense shaping: reward for moving closer to the blue pyramid
    2. Sparse bonus: reward for successfully picking up the blue pyramid
    """
    PYRAMID = jnp.int32(5)
    BLUE = jnp.int32(3)
    
    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Find the blue pyramid on the grid (in current and next state)
    mask_curr = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    mask_next = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    
    count_curr = jnp.sum(mask_curr)
    count_next = jnp.sum(mask_next)
    
    # Agent position (float)
    agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Mean position of blue pyramid on grid
    pyr_y_curr = jnp.sum(yy * mask_curr).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_curr, 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_x_curr = jnp.sum(xx * mask_curr).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_curr, 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    pyr_y_next = jnp.sum(yy * mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_next, 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_x_next = jnp.sum(xx * mask_next).astype(jnp.float32) / jnp.maximum(count_next, 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    
    # Manhattan distance from agent to blue pyramid in current state
    agent_y_curr = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x_curr = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    
    dist_curr = jnp.abs(agent_y_curr - pyr_y_curr) + jnp.abs(agent_x_curr - pyr_x_curr)
    dist_next = jnp.abs(agent_y - pyr_y_next) + jnp.abs(agent_x - pyr_x_next)
    
    # Check if agent is now holding the blue pyramid
    holding_blue_pyramid = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    was_holding_blue_pyramid = (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    
    # Success: just picked up the blue pyramid
    just_picked_up = holding_blue_pyramid & (~was_holding_blue_pyramid)
    
    # Dense reward: progress toward pyramid (only when pyramid is on grid)
    pyramid_on_grid = count_curr > 0
    dist_improvement = dist_curr - dist_next
    shaping_reward = jnp.where(pyramid_on_grid, dist_improvement * 0.1, jnp.float32(0.0))
    
    # Sparse reward for picking up
    success_reward = jnp.where(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))
    
    # Small penalty per step to encourage efficiency
    step_penalty = jnp.float32(-0.01)
    
    total_reward = success_reward + shaping_reward + step_penalty
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
